title: Ineos Grenadiers Targets Tour de France Comeback with AI-Driven Sponsorship Deal
content:
Ineos Grenadiers unveil AI-driven co-title sponsor Netcompany, with a new-look jersey set to debut at the 2026 Giro d’Italia.

Read the full article at Ineos Grenadiers Targets Tour de France Comeback with AI-Driven Sponsorship Deal on Velo.
author: ahood
